task:
Download the PDF at https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/tests/xhtml/testfiles/resources/pdf/dummy.pdf to /home/user/Downloads/dummy.pdf and add a bookmark for that PDF URL. Then navigate to https://example.com in the same tab.

When finished: /home/user/Downloads/dummy.pdf must exist, a bookmark for the PDF URL must exist, and the active tab must be showing example.com.

verification.description: Bookmark for the PDF URL exists
The w3.org PDF URL was visited
